subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1914
subcodes.first_line: Murshid was close to the notables and the prominent figures of Tihran. He embraced the Faith and became one of companions at the fort [Tabarsi].
subcodes.first_line_orig: مرشد که یکی از اصحاب قلعه بود در طهران با بزرگان و رجال مراوده داشت تصدیق امر کرد روزی
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @martyrs and martyrdom, @love of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
